name: Complete Bleach RPG with Lorebook
description:
Bleach: THE COMPLETE GRAND RPG [300K tokens Lorebook Included]

Wield a Zanpakutō or unleash Cero in the ultimate Bleach RPG! The only saga spanning Karakura, Seireitei, and Hueco Mundo awaits!

About the World

Enter Bleach’s supernatural universe, where Shinigami, Quincy, and Arrancar clash across dimensions. From Karakura Town’s neon streets to Seireitei’s feudal courts and Hueco Mundo’s desolate sands, every realm pulses with danger and intrigue. Rise as a Shinigami, Arrancar, or Fullbringer in a reactive world where NPCs—Gotei 13 Captains, Sternritter, Espada—pursue agendas of duty, hunger, or vengeance. Your choices shape the soul cycle, with permanent stakes.

Core Features

The platform’s only multi-dimensional Bleach RPG offers unmatched depth:

  • Multi-Dimensional Setting: Explore Karakura, Seireitei, Hueco Mundo, Hell, and Soul King Palace, each with unique cultures and dangers.

  • Role Selection: Choose Shinigami Captain, Quincy Sternritter, Arrancar Espada, Fullbringer, Visored, or custom roles like rogue Hōgyoku experiments.

  • Affiliations: Join Gotei 13, Wandenreich, Las Noches, Xcution, or go rogue, with actions reshaping faction dynamics.

  • Terminology Customization: Fully Authentic (Zanpakutō, Kidō), Middle Ground (default), or Full English Translation (soul-cutting sword).

  • Dynamic Systems: Track soul balance, Gotei politics, and Quincy wars, with actions rippling across dimensions.

  • Combat: Wield Zanpakutō (Shikai/Bankai), Kidō, Cero, or Blut, with outcomes based on skill and Reiatsu.

  • Reiatsu Mechanics: Standard to Boundless Reiatsu affects combat and NPC reactions, amplifying intimidation or respect.

  • Zanpakutō Progression: Awaken Shikai or Bankai via Jinzen, with powers reflecting your soul.

  • Kidō System: Cast spells like Sōkatsui or Kurohitsugi, with mastery tied to Reiryoku and training.

  • Hollowfication/Resurrección: Embrace monstrous power, risking soul corruption.

  • Quincy Powers: Use Heilig Bogen, Blut, or Vollständig, with risks tied to Yhwach’s influence.

  • Fullbringer Abilities: Manipulate object souls, with ties to Xcution’s rogue network.

  • Politics: Navigate Central 46, Wandenreich, and Las Noches, with betrayals shifting power.

  • Reactivity: Realms warp with Reiatsu; seasonal changes affect missions, like winter slowing Rukongai travel.

  • Intel: Gain info via Jigokuchō, Denreishinki, or Urahara’s shop, with risks of false leads.

  • Moral Complexity: Face dilemmas—Shinigami justice kills innocents, Hollows retain humanity, Quincy vengeance dooms worlds.

Character Creation

Define your role with OCC commands:

[OCC: I am <Role> affiliated with <Faction> in <Location>]

Examples:

  • [OCC: I am Shinigami Captain affiliated with Sixth Division in Seireitei]

  • [OCC: I am Quincy Sternritter affiliated with Wandenreich in Silbern]

  • [OCC: I am Custom rogue Visored in Karakura Town]

Terminology:

[OCC: Terminology Mode: <Fully Authentic | Middle Ground | Full English Translation>]

Era:

[OCC: Set Era: <Era, e.g., Soul Society Arc>]

Tip: Default era is start of Bleach; terminology defaults to Middle Ground.

How to Play

  • Write actions in first person (e.g., “I cast Sōkatsui at the Hollow.”).

  • Use [OCC: …] for role, era, or terminology.

  • Choices shape soul balance, factions, and re
